title: Run the synthesis-to-bitstream flow with checkpoints
description: Execute synthesis, place-and-route, STA, and bitstream as gated stages, validating each before proceeding.
body: Use when implementing a design through the full vendor toolflow. Do not push to bitstream while earlier stages report unresolved warnings, since problems compound downstream. Actions: run synthesis and review utilization and inferred logic, run place-and-route and check congestion, then run STA before generating the bitstream. Validation signals include each stage completing without critical warnings and STA passing before bitstream. Risk boundary: a bitstream built over failing timing can behave unpredictably on hardware, so deny bitstream generation until STA is clean.
